description: KQL queries for Azure Log Analytics SOC monitoring

queries.name: Failed Login Summary (Last 24h)
queries.kql:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| where ResultType != 0
| summarize FailCount=count(), DistinctUsers=dcount(UserPrincipalName), DistinctIPs=dcount(IPAddress) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| sort by TimeGenerated desc

queries.name: Privileged Admin Actions (Last 24h)
queries.kql:
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| where OperationName has_any ("Add member to role","Remove member from role","Update role")
| extend Initiator=tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName), Target=tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName), Role=tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName)
| project TimeGenerated, Initiator, Target, Role, OperationName, Result
| sort by TimeGenerated desc

queries.name: Azure Resource Deletions (Last 24h)
queries.kql:
AzureActivity
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| where OperationNameValue has "delete" and ActivityStatusValue =~ "Success"
| extend Caller=tostring(Caller), ResourceGroup=tostring(ResourceGroup)
| summarize DeleteCount=count(), Resources=make_set(Resource) by Caller, ResourceGroup, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where DeleteCount >= 2
| sort by DeleteCount desc

queries.name: New Service Principals Created (Last 7d)
queries.kql:
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d)
| where OperationName == "Add service principal"
| extend CreatedBy=tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName), SPName=tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName)
| project TimeGenerated, CreatedBy, SPName, Result
| sort by TimeGenerated desc

queries.name: Anomalous Storage Access (Large Downloads)
queries.kql:
StorageBlobLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| where OperationName =~ "GetBlob"
| where ResponseBodySize > 104857600
| extend CallerIP=tostring(CallerIpAddress)
| summarize TotalBytes=sum(ResponseBodySize), BlobCount=count() by CallerIP, AccountName, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| extend TotalMB=round(TotalBytes/1048576.0, 1)
| sort by TotalMB desc

queries.name: Key Vault Secret/Key Access (Last 24h)
queries.kql:
AzureDiagnostics
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| where ResourceType =~ "VAULTS" and Category =~ "AuditEvent"
| where OperationName has_any ("SecretGet","KeyDecrypt","KeySign","SecretList")
| extend CallerIP=tostring(clientInfo_s), Identity=tostring(identity_claim_upn_s)
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName, Identity, CallerIP, ResultType
| sort by TimeGenerated desc

queries.name: MFA Disabled or Bypassed Events
queries.kql:
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| where OperationName has_any ("Disable Strong Authentication","Update user","Update StsRefreshTokenValidFrom")
| extend ModifiedUser=tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName), ModifiedBy=tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName, ModifiedUser, ModifiedBy, Result
| sort by TimeGenerated desc

queries.name: Conditional Access Policy Failures (Last 24h)
queries.kql:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| where ConditionalAccessStatus =~ "failure"
| extend CADetails=tostring(ConditionalAccessPolicies)
| summarize FailCount=count(), IPList=make_set(IPAddress) by UserPrincipalName, AppDisplayName, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| sort by FailCount desc

queries.name: New Subscription Owner Assignments
queries.kql:
AzureActivity
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d)
| where OperationNameValue =~ "microsoft.authorization/roleassignments/write"
| where ActivityStatusValue =~ "Success"
| extend Properties=todynamic(Properties)
| where Properties.requestbody has "Owner"
| extend Caller=tostring(Caller), RoleAssigned=tostring(Properties.requestbody)
| project TimeGenerated, Caller, RoleAssigned
| sort by TimeGenerated desc

queries.name: VM Extensions Added (Potential Persistence)
queries.kql:
AzureActivity
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d)
| where OperationNameValue has "extensions" and OperationNameValue has "write"
| where ActivityStatusValue =~ "Success"
| extend Caller=tostring(Caller), VMName=tostring(Resource)
| project TimeGenerated, Caller, VMName, OperationNameValue
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
